name: @sinlair/reagent
description: Local-first research workspace and runtime CLI

scripts.build:packages: npm run build:core-package && npm run build:openclaw-package
scripts.check:packages: npm run check:core-package && npm run check:openclaw-package && npm run check:reference-package
scripts.check:all: npm run check && npm run check:packages
scripts.test:root: node tests/researchWorkflow.test.mjs && node tests/platform.test.mjs && node tests/gatewayService.test.mjs && node tests/memoryRecallService.test.mjs && node tests/memoryCompactionService.test.mjs && node tests/memoryRoutes.test.mjs && node tests/provider.test.mjs && node tests/nativeWeChatProvider.test.mjs && node tests/researchDirectionService.test.mjs && node tests/researchDiscoveryService.test.mjs && node tests/arxivPaperSearchProvider.test.mjs && node tests/researchFeedbackService.test.mjs && node tests/researchDirectionReportService.test.mjs && node tests/researchDiscoverySchedulerService.test.mjs && node tests/researchLinkIngestionService.test.mjs && node tests/researchRepoAnalysisService.test.mjs && node tests/researchPresentationService.test.mjs && node tests/researchPaperAnalysisService.test.mjs && node tests/researchBaselineService.test.mjs && node tests/researchModuleAssetService.test.mjs && node tests/researchMemoryRegistryService.test.mjs && node tests/researchTaskService.test.mjs && node tests/chatResearchAgentTools.test.mjs && node tests/chatResearchPaperAnalysisTool.test.mjs && node tests/chatResearchModuleTool.test.mjs
scripts.test: npm run test:root && npm run test:package
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run check && npm run build
